title: 2010年12月大学英语六级真题(第1套)

sections.title: Part IV Translation
sections.directions:
Complete the sentences by translating into English the Chinese given in brackets.
Please write your translation on Answer Sheet 2.
sections.source: 注意：此部分试题请在答题卡2 上作答，只需写出译文部分。82. There is no denying that you __________________________________ ( 越仔细越好) in83. Only when I reached my thirties _____________________________(我才意识到读书是不能被忽视的).84. Much _________________________________(使研究人员感到惊讶), the outcome of the85. Oh, my, I can’t find my key; ______________________________(我一定是把它忘在哪儿了).86. I ____________________________________________ (宁愿加入你们去做义工) than go to
